description_long: This shotgun features a striking, stylized design with a vivid color palette dominated by purples, reds, and greens, and is adorned with a menacing, organic motif resembling exposed teeth and sinew along the receiver and stock. The body is sleek and modern, with a polymer-like finish and a ribbed fore-end for improved grip. The magazine is curved and black, suggesting a semi-automatic or magazine-fed action. The stock is robust and contoured, with a pronounced cheek rest and a green buttpad, while the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfort. The barrel is relatively short and unadorned, with a simple cylindrical muzzle. The overall appearance is aggressive and eye-catching, likely intended for a contemporary or near-future urban setting.
description: A vividly colored, stylized shotgun with organic, sinew-like motifs, a curved magazine, and a robust, contoured stock. Its aggressive design features purples, reds, and greens with a modern, polymer-like finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full organic motif, curved magazine, and contoured stock with green buttpad.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening and the narrow, streamlined profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the organic motif, curved magazine, and ergonomic grip, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the green buttpad and the symmetrical, contoured stock design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: full stock with pronounced cheek rest and green buttpad
attribute_action_mechanism: semi-automatic (magazine-fed, no visible pump or break-action)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no visible finger grooves
